title: EVgo Q4 2022 Earnings 2023 Guidance
text: EVgo reported Q4 2022 earnings results that beat Wall Street expectations on revenue and losses. Loss per share was 6 cents versus a loss of 16 cents expected. Revenue was $27.3 million versus $21.8 million expected. The company reported fourth-quarter revenue that beat Wall Street estimates as demand for chargers from business clients boomed. A key driver of this outperformance was revenue from eXtend, which totaled about $16.7 million in Q4 2022, representing 61% of EVgo's total revenue for the period, up significantly from just $114,000 a year prior. This represented explosive growth in EVgo's commercial charging partnerships. The strong Q4 2022 results set a positive tone heading into 2023, with the company demonstrating successful execution in expanding its eXtend partnerships with commercial customers.
